1	/**
2	 * Transaction Refund Endpoint
3	 *
4	 * POST /api/admin/transactions/{id}/refund
5	 * Admin-only — calls refundStripe or refundPayPal and updates status to 'refunded'
6	 *
7	 * @fileType api-route
8	 * @domain payments
9	 */
10	
11	import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
12	import { getPayload, NotFound } from 'payload'
13	
14	import config from '@payload-config'
15	import { refundStripe } from '@/lib/payment/stripe'
16	import { refundPayPal } from '@/lib/payment/paypal'
17	import { AccountRole } from '@/server/payload/collections/Users/roles'
18	
19	interface RouteParams {
20	  params: Promise<{ id: string }>
21	}

23	export async function POST(req: NextRequest, { params }: RouteParams) {
24	  const { id } = await params
25	  const payload = await getPayload({ config })
26	
27	  // 1. Authenticate
28	  const authResult = await payload.auth({ headers: req.headers })
29	  if (!authResult.user) {
30	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
31	  }
32

34	  if (
35	    !('collection' in authResult.user) ||
36	    authResult.user.collection !== 'users' ||
37	    authResult.user.role !== AccountRole.Admin
38	  ) {
39	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Forbidden' }, { status: 403 })
40	  }
41	
42	  // 3. Fetch transaction

45	  try {
46	    transaction = await payload.findByID({

49	  try {
50	    transaction = (await payload.findByID({
51	>>>>>>> origin/dev
52	      collection: 'transactions',
53	      id,
54	      depth: 0,
55	      overrideAccess: true,
56	<<<<<<< HEAD
57	    })
58	  } catch (err) {
59	    if (err instanceof NotFound) {
60	      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Transaction not found' }, { status: 404 })
61	    }
62	    throw err
63	=======
64	    })) as unknown as Record<string, unknown> | null
65	  } catch (err) {
66	    if (err instanceof Error && (err.name === 'NotFound' || err.message.includes('Not Found'))) {
67	      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Transaction not found' }, { status: 404 })
68	    }
69	    throw err
70	  }
71	
72	  if (!transaction) {
73	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Transaction not found' }, { status: 404 })
74	>>>>>>> origin/dev
75	  }
76	
77	  // 4. Validate status — double-refund guard
78	  if (transaction.status === 'refunded') {
79	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'העסקה כבר הוחזרה' }, { status: 400 })
80	  }
81	
82	  if (transaction.status !== 'succeeded') {
83	    return NextResponse.json(
84	      { error: 'Only succeeded transactions can be refunded' },
85	      { status: 400 },
86	    )
87	  }
88	
89	  // 5. Call provider refund
90	  const { provider, providerTransactionId, amount } = transaction as {
91	    provider: 'stripe' | 'paypal'
92	    providerTransactionId: string
93	    amount: number
94	  }
95	
96	  try {
97	    if (provider === 'stripe') {
98	      await refundStripe(providerTransactionId, amount)
99	    } else if (provider === 'paypal') {
100	      await refundPayPal(providerTransactionId, amount)
101	    } else {
102	      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unknown payment provider' }, { status: 400 })
103	    }
104	  } catch (err) {
105	    payload.logger.error({ error: err, transactionId: id, provider }, 'Refund operation failed')
106	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Refund operation failed' }, { status: 500 })
107	  }
108	
109	  // 6. Update status to refunded
110	  await payload.update({
111	    collection: 'transactions',
112	    id,
113	    data: { status: 'refunded' },
114	    overrideAccess: true,
115	  })
116	
117	  return NextResponse.json({ success: true })
118	}

content.content:
1	/**
2	 * Transaction Refund Endpoint
3	 *
4	 * POST /api/admin/transactions/{id}/refund
5	 * Admin-only — calls refundStripe or refundPayPal and updates status to 'refunded'
6	 *
7	 * @fileType api-route
8	 * @domain payments
9	 */
10	
11	import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
12	import { getPayload } from 'payload'
13	
14	import config from '@payload-config'
15	import { refundStripe } from '@/lib/payment/stripe'
16	import { refundPayPal } from '@/lib/payment/paypal'
17	import { AccountRole } from '@/server/payload/collections/Users/roles'
18	
19	interface RouteParams {
20	  params: Promise<{ id: string }>
21	}
22	
23	export async function POST(req: NextRequest, { params }: RouteParams) {
24	  const { id } = await params
25	  const payload = await getPayload({ config })
26	
27	  // 1. Authenticate
28	  const authResult = await payload.auth({ headers: req.headers })
29	  if (!authResult.user) {
30	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
31	  }
32	
33	  // 2. Check admin role
34	  if (
35	    !('collection' in authResult.user) ||
36	    authResult.user.collection !== 'users' ||
37	    authResult.user.role !== AccountRole.Admin
38	  ) {
39	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Forbidden' }, { status: 403 })
40	  }
41	
42	  // 3. Fetch transaction
43	  let transaction: Record<string, unknown> | null = null
44	  try {
45	    transaction = (await payload.findByID({
46	      collection: 'transactions',
47	      id,
48	      depth: 0,
49	      overrideAccess: true,
50	    })) as unknown as Record<string, unknown> | null
51	  } catch (err) {
52	    if (err instanceof Error && (err.name === 'NotFound' || err.message.includes('Not Found'))) {
53	      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Transaction not found' }, { status: 404 })
54	    }
55	    throw err
56	  }
57	
58	  if (!transaction) {
59	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Transaction not found' }, { status: 404 })
60	  }
61	
62	  // 4. Validate status — double-refund guard
63	  if (transaction.status === 'refunded') {
64	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'העסקה כבר הוחזרה' }, { status: 400 })
65	  }
66	
67	  if (transaction.status !== 'succeeded') {
68	    return NextResponse.json(
69	      { error: 'Only succeeded transactions can be refunded' },
70	      { status: 400 },
71	    )
72	  }
73	
74	  // 5. Call provider refund
75	  const { provider, providerTransactionId, amount } = transaction as {
76	    provider: 'stripe' | 'paypal'
77	    providerTransactionId: string
78	    amount: number
79	  }
80	
81	  try {
82	    if (provider === 'stripe') {
83	      await refundStripe(providerTransactionId, amount)
84	    } else if (provider === 'paypal') {
85	      await refundPayPal(providerTransactionId, amount)
86	    } else {
87	      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unknown payment provider' }, { status: 400 })
88	    }
89	  } catch (err) {
90	    payload.logger.error({ error: err, transactionId: id, provider }, 'Refund operation failed')
91	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Refund operation failed' }, { status: 500 })
92	  }
93	
94	  // 6. Update status to refunded
95	  await payload.update({
96	    collection: 'transactions',
97	    id,
98	    data: { status: 'refunded' },
99	    overrideAccess: true,
100	  })
101	
102	  return NextResponse.json({ success: true })
103	}
104
